# flespi_cdn (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the CDN

### Read-Only

- `blocked` (Boolean) Whether the CDN is blocked
- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `size` (Number) Size of the CDN storage in bytes
